title: Broaden validation and CI integration
description: Completed. Validation now includes runtime JSON Schema checks, Markdown style warnings with line numbers, a standalone dependency-free validator with text/JSON/GitHub output, packaged CLI entrypoints, and a command that generates `.pinake/tools/validate-pinake.mjs` plus `.github/workflows/pinake-validate.yml`.

checklist.text: Expand tests for .pinake storage, migration, settings merge, and TreeView preview/edit
Keep compile, lint, and VS Code extension tests passing after the refactor
Add markdownlint, CLI/CI validator output, and GitHub Actions workflow support
